l1_risks.name: Credit Risk
l1_risks.definition: Risk of loss arising from a borrower's failure to meet contractual obligations

l1_risks.name: Market Risk
l1_risks.definition: Risk of losses in positions arising from movements in market prices

l1_risks.name: Operational Risk
l1_risks.definition: Risk of loss resulting from inadequate or failed processes, people, systems, or external events

l1_risks.name: Strategic Risk
l1_risks.definition: Risk arising from adverse business decisions, improper implementation of decisions, or lack of responsiveness to industry changes

l1_risks.name: Liquidity Risk
l1_risks.definition: Risk that an entity will be unable to meet short-term financial demands

l1_risks.name: Reputational Risk
l1_risks.definition: Risk of damage to reputation affecting stakeholder trust and confidence

_metadata.description: Sample input reproducing manuscript case studies (Geopolitical, Model, Climate, Digital Assets risks)
_metadata.source: Faria, M. (2026). A Set-Theoretic Framework for Enterprise Risk Taxonomy Classification
_metadata.weight_derivation: Author's professional judgment informed by professional experience, Basel SR 11-7, NGFS/TCFD guidance, Caldara & Iacoviello (2022), and emerging digital asset regulatory frameworks (OCC, SEC, Basel BCBS)
